text:
会場を守ってくれてありがとう！
これでまた現地の設営チームが
準備を再開できるよ！

何から何まで感謝だよ！
こんな企画ができて、本当に幸せ！
楽しみ
Thanks so much for driving those enemies off! Now the construction team can get back to work.
I can't even begin to tell you how grateful I am! I'm so glad we're gonna be able to pull this off. I hope you look forward to it!
